description: Lido is a liquid staking protocol that allows users to stake ETH and receive stETH, a rebasing liquid staking token representing their staked position. Governance operates through an Aragon-based DAO (LDO token voting) with a Dual Governance module that gives stETH holders veto power over DAO proposals via an EmergencyProtectedTimelock. The protocol manages {{totalCapitalAtRisk}} in capital, with oracle committees reporting validator balances and a guardian committee securing the deposit flow against front-running attacks. The Lido V3 (stVaults) upgrade adds a customizable staking layer where node operators and institutional users deploy individual StakingVaults coordinated by a central VaultHub, with per-vault Dashboards, an OperatorGrid for tiered collateralization, a PredepositGuarantee for validator security, and a LazyOracle that reconciles vault state via merkle proofs against the AccountingOracle. Key external dependency is the Ethereum Beacon Chain DepositContract.

eth:0x3e40d73eb977dc6a537af587d48316fee6.name: Lido DAO Agent
eth:0x3e40d73eb977dc6a537af587d48316fee6.description: The primary governance executor for the Lido DAO. Holds DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE on most protocol contracts and can upgrade proxies, manage staking modules, configure oracle parameters, and grant/revoke roles across the entire system. Controls {{lidoDaoAgentCapital}} in direct capital exposure across 17 contracts. All actions flow through the Voting contract, which is gated by the DualGovernance module.

eth:0x2e59a20f205bb85a89c53f193645468065.name: Lido DAO Voting
eth:0x2e59a20f205bb85a89c53f193645468065.description: Aragon Voting contract where LDO token holders create and vote on proposals. Can grant, revoke, and manage permissions on the ACL contract, controlling role assignments across the entire DAO infrastructure including the Agent, Finance, and TokenManager apps.

eth:0xc1db28b3301331277e307fdcff8de28242.name: DualGovernance
eth:0xc1db28b3301331277e307fdcff8de28242.description: Governance module that gives stETH holders veto power over DAO proposals. Submits proposals to and schedules execution on the EmergencyProtectedTimelock. Can cancel all non-executed proposals if the governance state enters a deadlock.

eth:0xce0425301c85c5ea2a0873a2dee44d78e0.name: EmergencyProtectedTimelock
eth:0xce0425301c85c5ea2a0873a2dee44d78e0.description: Timelock contract that gates all governance executions from DualGovernance. Executes proposals through the Executor contract after the required delay. Can transfer and renounce ownership of the Executor.

eth:0x23e0b465633ff5178808f4a75186e2f2f9.name: Executor
eth:0x23e0b465633ff5178808f4a75186e2f2f9.description: Immutable execution contract that forwards governance calls from the EmergencyProtectedTimelock to the Lido DAO Agent and DualGovernance configuration. Can configure governance parameters including submission delays, scheduling delays, and governance state transitions.

eth:0x8b7854488fde088d686ea672b6ba1a5242.name: Emergency 4/7 Multisig
eth:0x8b7854488fde088d686ea672b6ba1a5242.description: 4-of-7 Safe multisig that can activate emergency mode on the EmergencyProtectedTimelock, execute proposals during emergency mode, and reset the governance system. This is the ultimate circuit breaker for the protocol's governance.

eth:0xffe21561251c49adccfad065c94fb4931d.name: Reseal Committee 5/6 Multisig
eth:0xffe21561251c49adccfad065c94fb4931d.description: 5-of-6 Safe multisig that can reseal sealable contracts through the DualGovernance module. This allows re-pausing protocol components that were previously sealed by the GateSeal mechanism.

eth:0xc52fc3081123073078698f1eac2f1dc7bd.name: Community Staking 4/6 Multisig
eth:0xc52fc3081123073078698f1eac2f1dc7bd.description: 4-of-6 GnosisSafe multisig that can set bond curves on the CSAccounting contract, controlling the collateral requirements for Community Staking Module node operators.

eth:0x852ded011285fe67063a08005c71a85690.name: AccountingOracle
eth:0x852ded011285fe67063a08005c71a85690.description: Oracle contract that reports validator balances and staking rewards to the stETH token contract. Triggers handleOracleReport which rebases stETH, updates exited validator counts, and manages staking module reward distribution. Controls {{accountingOracleCapital}} in reachable capital.

eth:0xffa96d84def2ea035c7ab153d8b991128e.name: DepositSecurityModule
eth:0xffa96d84def2ea035c7ab153d8b991128e.description: Immutable module that gates ETH deposits to the Beacon Chain DepositContract. Requires a quorum of guardian signatures to authorize deposits, protecting against deposit front-running attacks. Can also decrease vetted signing keys on the StakingRouter. Controls {{depositSecurityCapital}} in reachable capital.

eth:0x388c818ca8b9251b393131c08a736a67cc.name: LidoExecutionLayerRewardsVault
eth:0x388c818ca8b9251b393131c08a736a67cc.description: Immutable vault that collects execution layer rewards (MEV, priority fees) and forwards them to the stETH token contract via receiveELRewards. Controls {{elRewardsVaultCapital}} in direct capital.

eth:0xb9d7934878b5fb9610b3fe8a5e441e8fad.name: WithdrawalVault
eth:0xb9d7934878b5fb9610b3fe8a5e441e8fad.description: Upgradeable vault that receives withdrawals from the Beacon Chain and forwards them to the stETH token contract via receiveWithdrawals. Proxy admin is Lido DAO Agent. Controls {{withdrawalVaultCapital}} in direct capital.

eth:0xd624b08c83baecf0807dd2c6880c3154a5.name: HashConsensus (AccountingOracle)
eth:0xd624b08c83baecf0807dd2c6880c3154a5.description: Immutable consensus contract for the AccountingOracle. Oracle committee members submit report hashes, and once quorum is reached, the consensus report is forwarded to the AccountingOracle for processing.

eth:0xae7ab96520de3a18e5e111b5eaab095312.name: stETH Token Contract
eth:0xae7ab96520de3a18e5e111b5eaab095312.description: The Lido stETH token itself, which has permissioned functions to request share burns, commit shares to burn, and receive reward and withdrawal reports. These functions are called by other protocol contracts (Burner, AccountingOracle) as part of normal operations.

eth:0xda7de2ecddfc6c3af10108db212acbbf9e.name: CSModule
eth:0xda7de2ecddfc6c3af10108db212acbbf9e.description: Community Staking Module contract that manages community node operators. Can process exit delay reports, triggered exits, and manage deposits and bond operations on CSAccounting and CSExitPenalties.

eth:0xaa328816027f2d32b9f56d190bc9fa4a5c.name: CSStrikes
eth:0xaa328816027f2d32b9f56d190bc9fa4a5c.description: Community Staking strikes reporter that can process strikes reports on CSExitPenalties, penalizing community node operators who fail to meet performance requirements.

eth:0xdc00116a0d3e064427da2600449cfd2566.name: TriggerableWithdrawalsGateway
eth:0xdc00116a0d3e064427da2600449cfd2566.description: Immutable contract that can add withdrawal requests and trigger validator exits on the StakingRouter. Part of the validator exit mechanism.

eth:0x7914b5a1539b97bd0bbd155757f25fd79a.name: ResealManager
eth:0x7914b5a1539b97bd0bbd155757f25fd79a.description: Immutable contract that can pause and resume CSAccounting. Acts as a mechanism to reseal protocol components without requiring full governance action.

eth:0xe1686c2e90eb41a48356c1cc7faa17629a.name: GateSeal
eth:0xe1686c2e90eb41a48356c1cc7faa17629a.description: Immutable one-time-use contract that can pause CSAccounting for a predefined duration. Once triggered, it cannot be reused — a new GateSeal must be deployed by governance.

eth:0xb314d4a76c457c93150d308787939063f4.name: VettedGate
eth:0xb314d4a76c457c93150d308787939063f4.description: Upgradeable contract that can set bond curves on CSAccounting, controlling collateral requirements for vetted community staking operators.

eth:0xf73a1260d222f447210581ddf212d915c0.name: TokenManager
eth:0xf73a1260d222f447210581ddf212d915c0.description: Aragon TokenManager app that manages the LDO governance token. Can mint and destroy LDO tokens, change the token controller, and enable/disable token transfers. Controls {{tokenManagerCapital}} in direct capital through the LDO token and Voting contract.

eth:0xb9e5cbb9ca5b0d659238807e84d0176930.name: Finance
eth:0xb9e5cbb9ca5b0d659238807e84d0176930.description: Aragon Finance app that can transfer tokens from the Lido DAO Agent treasury. Gated by ACL permissions managed through the DAO Voting contract.

eth:0xf65614d73952be91ce0ae7dd9cff25ba15.name: TiebreakerCoreCommittee
eth:0xf65614d73952be91ce0ae7dd9cff25ba15.description: Immutable committee contract that can break governance deadlocks by scheduling proposals and resuming sealed contracts through the DualGovernance module. Acts as a safety mechanism when governance enters an unresolvable state.

eth:0x175742c3ddd88b0192df3ecf98f180a79c.name: TiebreakerCoreCommittee (Secondary)
eth:0x175742c3ddd88b0192df3ecf98f180a79c.description: Secondary TiebreakerCoreCommittee instance that can schedule proposals and resume sealable contracts. Part of the tiebreaker mechanism for resolving governance deadlocks.

eth:0xbdb567672c867db533119c2dcd4fb9d8b4.name: ValidatorExitDelayVerifier
eth:0xbdb567672c867db533119c2dcd4fb9d8b4.description: Immutable verifier contract that can report validator exit delays to the StakingRouter, triggering penalties for staking modules whose operators fail to exit validators promptly.

eth:0x4d72bff1beac69925f8bd12526a39baab0.name: CSAccounting
eth:0x4d72bff1beac69925f8bd12526a39baab0.description: Community Staking accounting contract that can request share burns on the Burner. Called by the CSModule when processing bond operations for community staking node operators.

eth:0x55032650b14df07b85bf18a3a3ec8e0af2.name: Unknown (0x5503...28d5)
eth:0x55032650b14df07b85bf18a3a3ec8e0af2.description: Unidentified address that can request share burns (both for cover and regular) on the Burner contract.

eth:0xf165148978fa3ce74d76043f833463c340.name: Legacy Voting Forwarder
eth:0xf165148978fa3ce74d76043f833463c340.description: Unknown contract that can forward calls through the Voting contract. Likely a legacy integration point in the Aragon governance system.

eth:0x226f9265cbc37231882b7409658c18bb77.name: StakingRouter (Self-Admin)
eth:0x226f9265cbc37231882b7409658c18bb77.description: Internal StakingRouter permission for initialization and upgrade finalization. These are one-time-use functions.

eth:0x5fd0ddbc3351d009eb3f88de7cd081a614.name: Deposit Guardian EOA (0x5fd0...9F1)
eth:0x5fd0ddbc3351d009eb3f88de7cd081a614.description: One of six Deposit Security Module guardians. Can pause deposits, authorize deposit transactions via quorum signatures, and unvet node operator signing keys.

eth:0x7912fa976bcde9c2cf728e213e892ad758.name: Deposit Guardian EOA (0x7912...AaF)
eth:0x7912fa976bcde9c2cf728e213e892ad758.description: One of six Deposit Security Module guardians. Can pause deposits, authorize deposit transactions via quorum signatures, and unvet node operator signing keys.

eth:0xd4ef84b638b334699bcf5af4b0410b8ccd.name: Deposit Guardian EOA (0xd4EF...43f)
eth:0xd4ef84b638b334699bcf5af4b0410b8ccd.description: One of six Deposit Security Module guardians. Can pause deposits, authorize deposit transactions via quorum signatures, and unvet node operator signing keys.

eth:0xf82d88217c249297c6037ba77ce34b3d8a.name: Deposit Guardian EOA (0xf82D...d43)
eth:0xf82d88217c249297c6037ba77ce34b3d8a.description: One of six Deposit Security Module guardians. Can pause deposits, authorize deposit transactions via quorum signatures, and unvet node operator signing keys.

eth:0xa56b128ea2ea237052b0fa2a96a387c0e4.name: Deposit Guardian EOA (0xa56b...7d8)
eth:0xa56b128ea2ea237052b0fa2a96a387c0e4.description: One of six Deposit Security Module guardians. Can pause deposits, authorize deposit transactions via quorum signatures, and unvet node operator signing keys.

eth:0x6d22ae126eb2c37f67a1391b37ff4f2863.name: Deposit Guardian EOA (0x6d22...389)
eth:0x6d22ae126eb2c37f67a1391b37ff4f2863.description: One of six Deposit Security Module guardians. Can pause deposits, authorize deposit transactions via quorum signatures, and unvet node operator signing keys.

eth:0x73181107c8d9ed4ce0bbef7a0b4ccf3320.name: Oracle Committee Member (0x7318...d12)
eth:0x73181107c8d9ed4ce0bbef7a0b4ccf3320.description: One of nine oracle committee members. Submits consensus reports to the AccountingOracle, ValidatorsExitBusOracle, and CSFeeOracle HashConsensus contracts. Quorum of these members is required to finalize oracle reports.

eth:0x285f8537e1daeedaf617e96c742f2cf36d.name: Oracle Committee Member (0x285f...cfB)
eth:0x285f8537e1daeedaf617e96c742f2cf36d.description: One of nine oracle committee members. Submits consensus reports to the AccountingOracle, ValidatorsExitBusOracle, and CSFeeOracle HashConsensus contracts.

eth:0x404335bce530400a5814375e7ec1fb55fa.name: Oracle Committee Member (0x4043...eA2)
eth:0x404335bce530400a5814375e7ec1fb55fa.description: One of nine oracle committee members. Submits consensus reports to the AccountingOracle, ValidatorsExitBusOracle, and CSFeeOracle HashConsensus contracts.

eth:0x946d3b081ed19173dc83cd974fc69e1e76.name: Oracle Committee Member (0x946D...d78)
eth:0x946d3b081ed19173dc83cd974fc69e1e76.description: One of nine oracle committee members. Submits consensus reports to the AccountingOracle, ValidatorsExitBusOracle, and CSFeeOracle HashConsensus contracts.

eth:0x007de4a5f7bc37e2f26c0cb2e8a95006ee.name: Oracle Committee Member (0x007D...9b5)
eth:0x007de4a5f7bc37e2f26c0cb2e8a95006ee.description: One of nine oracle committee members. Submits consensus reports to the AccountingOracle, ValidatorsExitBusOracle, and CSFeeOracle HashConsensus contracts.

eth:0xc79f702202e3a6b0b6310b537e786b9aca.name: Oracle Committee Member (0xc79F...BAf)
eth:0xc79f702202e3a6b0b6310b537e786b9aca.description: One of nine oracle committee members. Submits consensus reports to the AccountingOracle, ValidatorsExitBusOracle, and CSFeeOracle HashConsensus contracts.

eth:0x61c91ecd902eb56e314bb2d5c5c0778544.name: Oracle Committee Member (0x61c9...1c8)
eth:0x61c91ecd902eb56e314bb2d5c5c0778544.description: One of nine oracle committee members. Submits consensus reports to the AccountingOracle, ValidatorsExitBusOracle, and CSFeeOracle HashConsensus contracts.

eth:0xe57b3792adcc5da47ef4ff588883f0ee0c.name: Oracle Committee Member (0xe57B...5c9)
eth:0xe57b3792adcc5da47ef4ff588883f0ee0c.description: One of nine oracle committee members. Submits consensus reports to the AccountingOracle, ValidatorsExitBusOracle, and CSFeeOracle HashConsensus contracts.

eth:0x4118dad7f348a4063bd15786c299de2f3b.name: Oracle Committee Member (0x4118...3F3)
eth:0x4118dad7f348a4063bd15786c299de2f3b.description: One of nine oracle committee members. Submits consensus reports to the AccountingOracle, ValidatorsExitBusOracle, and CSFeeOracle HashConsensus contracts.

eth:0x1d201be093d847f6446530efb0e8fb426d.name: VaultHub
eth:0x1d201be093d847f6446530efb0e8fb426d.description: Upgradeable central coordinator for all Lido V3 StakingVaults. Connects individual vaults to the core stETH accounting, enforces reserve ratios and force-rebalance thresholds, mints/burns stETH liabilities against vault collateral, and socializes bad debt. Lido DAO Agent holds DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE and the proxy admin role. PAUSE_ROLE is held by the Vaults GateSeal and ResealManager; VALIDATOR_EXIT_ROLE and BAD_DEBT_MASTER_ROLE are held by the VaultsAdapter (EasyTrack-gated).

eth:0x23ed611be0e1a820978875c0122f922608.name: Accounting
eth:0x23ed611be0e1a820978875c0122f922608.description: Upgradeable V3 Accounting contract that routes oracle reports into the stETH token contract and coordinates vault share accounting with VaultHub and LazyOracle. Proxy admin is the Lido DAO Agent; governance can upgrade the implementation.

eth:0xc69685e89cefc327b43b7234ac646451b2.name: OperatorGrid
eth:0xc69685e89cefc327b43b7234ac646451b2.description: Upgradeable node operator registry for Lido V3 stVaults. Maintains node operator tiers with configurable collateralization parameters (reserve ratio, rebalance threshold, fees). Lido DAO Agent holds DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE; REGISTRY_ROLE is held by the EVMScriptExecutor and VaultsAdapter (both governance-gated via Voting / EasyTrack motions).

eth:0xf4bf42c6d6a0e38825785048124dbad6c9.name: PredepositGuarantee
eth:0xf4bf42c6d6a0e38825785048124dbad6c9.description: Upgradeable predeposit security module for Lido V3 vaults. Holds ETH as validator predeposit collateral and enforces that node operators prove withdrawal-credential configuration before their vaults can perform full beacon-chain deposits, preventing front-running. Lido DAO Agent holds DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE; PAUSE_ROLE held by the Vaults GateSeal and ResealManager; RESUME_ROLE held by the ResealManager.

eth:0x5fbe8cef9ccc56ad245736d3c5baf82ad5.name: StakingVault UpgradeableBeacon
eth:0x5fbe8cef9ccc56ad245736d3c5baf82ad5.description: Immutable OpenZeppelin UpgradeableBeacon that holds the current StakingVault implementation. Every StakingVault deployed by the VaultFactory is a BeaconProxy that reads its implementation from this beacon. The Lido DAO Agent is the sole owner and can upgrade all StakingVaults atomically by calling upgradeTo(). This is the highest-leverage upgrade key in the V3 system.

eth:0x02ca7772ff14a9f6c1a08af385aa96bb1b.name: VaultFactory
eth:0x02ca7772ff14a9f6c1a08af385aa96bb1b.description: Immutable factory that deploys new StakingVault beacon proxies (using the UpgradeableBeacon) and clones of the Dashboard template. Permissionless — any address can deploy a vault; the deployer configures the initial owner, node operator, and fee parameters via the Dashboard.

eth:0x294825c2764c7d412dc32d87e2242c4f1d.name: Dashboard (template)
eth:0x294825c2764c7d412dc32d87e2242c4f1d.description: Immutable Dashboard template cloned per-vault by the VaultFactory. Each clone exposes role-based access control for vault operations: FUND_ROLE, WITHDRAW_ROLE, MINT_ROLE, BURN_ROLE, REBALANCE_ROLE, NODE_OPERATOR_MANAGER_ROLE, PAUSE_BEACON_CHAIN_DEPOSITS_ROLE, VAULT_CONFIGURATION_ROLE, and others. The template itself has no members — only the per-vault clones do.

eth:0x5db427080200c235f2ae8cd17a7be87921.name: LazyOracle
eth:0x5db427080200c235f2ae8cd17a7be87921.description: Upgradeable V3 oracle contract that receives a daily state-root snapshot from the AccountingOracle and allows per-vault Merkle proofs to be submitted permissionlessly to update individual vault reports. Lido DAO Agent holds DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE and can call UPDATE_SANITY_PARAMS_ROLE to adjust the maximum Lido fee rate, reward ratio, and quarantine period.

eth:0x28f9ac198c4e0fa6a9ad2c2f97cb38f1a3.name: VaultsAdapter
eth:0x28f9ac198c4e0fa6a9ad2c2f97cb38f1a3.description: Immutable EasyTrack adapter that exposes vault-management operations to a 4-of-7 trusted-caller Safe. Holds REGISTRY_ROLE on OperatorGrid (tier management) and VALIDATOR_EXIT_ROLE + BAD_DEBT_MASTER_ROLE on VaultHub (force validator exits, socialize bad debt). All calls are mediated by the EVMScriptExecutor and subject to EasyTrack motion timelocks.

eth:0x18a1065c81b0cc356f1b1c843ddd5e14e4.name: Vault Operations 4/7 Safe
eth:0x18a1065c81b0cc356f1b1c843ddd5e14e4.description: 4-of-7 GnosisSafe (v1.4.1) that is the trustedCaller on VaultsAdapter. Through the adapter it can register/update/jail node operator tiers on OperatorGrid, force validator exits, and socialize bad debt on VaultHub — all gated by EasyTrack timelocks.

eth:0x881dad714679a6feaa636446a049910137.name: Vaults GateSeal
eth:0x881dad714679a6feaa636446a049910137.description: Immutable one-time-use GateSeal that can pause both VaultHub and PredepositGuarantee for 14 days. Controlled by the existing 4/6 Sealing Committee Safe (0x8772...760C). Expires May 2027; replacement GateSeal must be redeployed by governance.

eth:0x25e35855783bec3e49355a29e110f02ed8.name: TokenRateNotifier
eth:0x25e35855783bec3e49355a29e110f02ed8.description: Immutable contract that pushes the stETH/wstETH exchange rate to L2 token-rate observers. Lido DAO Agent is the owner and can add or remove observers. Currently has one observer (OpStackTokenRatePusher).

eth:0x00000000219ab540356cbb839cbe05303d.name: Ethereum Beacon Chain DepositContract
eth:0x00000000219ab540356cbb839cbe05303d.description: The canonical Ethereum 2.0 deposit contract used by Lido to stake ETH with validators. The DepositSecurityModule and each Lido V3 StakingVault call deposit() to stake ETH; DepositSecurityModule also reads get_deposit_root() to verify deposit data integrity. This is an immutable Ethereum protocol contract — if it fails or is compromised, Lido cannot process new deposits.

eth:0x000f3df6d732807ef1319fb7b8bb8522d0.name: EIP-4788 BEACON_ROOTS Predeploy
eth:0x000f3df6d732807ef1319fb7b8bb8522d0.description: Ethereum consensus-layer precompile that exposes recent beacon block roots to execution-layer contracts. The ValidatorExitDelayVerifier and CSVerifier read from this precompile to verify validator state proofs for exit-delay penalties and community staking validator accounting.

eth:0x00000961ef480eb55e80d19ad83579a64c.name: EIP-7002 WITHDRAWAL_REQUEST Predeploy
eth:0x00000961ef480eb55e80d19ad83579a64c.description: Ethereum consensus-layer precompile for triggering validator withdrawals from the execution layer. TriggerableWithdrawalsGateway and VaultsAdapter call this predeploy to force-exit validators on behalf of the StakingRouter and V3 staking vaults.

eth:0x7f39c581f595b53c5cb19bd0b3f8da6c93.name: wstETH (Wrapped stETH)
eth:0x7f39c581f595b53c5cb19bd0b3f8da6c93.description: The wrapped stETH contract that holds stETH on behalf of wstETH holders. Contains {{wstethBalance}} in stETH, making it the largest single concentration of protocol funds. wstETH provides a non-rebasing wrapper around stETH for DeFi integrations.

eth:0x889edc2edab5f40e902b864ad4d7ade8e4.name: WithdrawalQueueERC721 (stETH)
eth:0x889edc2edab5f40e902b864ad4d7ade8e4.description: Withdrawal request queue where users lock stETH to receive ETH. Holds {{withdrawalQueueBalance}} in stETH and ETH balances, plus {{withdrawalQueuePositions}} in DeFi positions. Requests are fulfilled as the protocol processes validator exits and receives Beacon Chain withdrawals.

eth:0xae7ab96520de3a18e5e111b5eaab095312.name: Lido stETH Token (ETH Buffer)
eth:0xae7ab96520de3a18e5e111b5eaab095312.description: The stETH token contract itself holds {{stethBufferBalance}} in ETH as a deposit buffer before it is staked on the Beacon Chain. This buffer provides immediate withdrawal liquidity for small requests.

eth:0x5a98fcbea516cf06857215779fd812ca3b.name: Lido DAO Token (LDO)
eth:0x5a98fcbea516cf06857215779fd812ca3b.description: The LDO governance token contract. Holds {{ldoTokenBalance}} in miscellaneous token balances.

codeAndAudits.title: Code & Audits
codeAndAudits.description: Smart contract analysis and audit history
